popularStory.headline: JImena Munoz (d 1128) Bio Sketch
popularStory.description:
BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/Galicia.htm#JimenaMunozdied1128, as of 11/6/2014
 [JIMENA Muñoz ([1055/65]-Espinareda del Bierzo 1128, after 25 May, [maybe 23 Jul], bur San Andres de Espina …

sourceList.title: Rodríguez González, María del Carmen (2007). "Concubina o esposa. Reflexiones sobre la unión de Jimena Muñiz con Alfonso VI". Studia historica. Historia medieval (25): 143–168
Quintana Prieto, Augusto (1969). "Jimena Muniz, madre de Doña Teresa de Portugal". Revista Portuguesa de História. 12 (12): 223-280.

Salazar y Acha, Jaime de (1992–1993). "Contribución al estudio del reinado de Alfonso VI de Castilla: algunas aclaraciones sobre su política matrimonial". Anales de la Real Academia Matritense de Heráldica y Genealogía: 299–335.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Jimena Muñoz於1060年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安時，她的父親Munio Muñoz de Bierzo Conde de Bierzo40歲，母親Velazquita Muñoz31歲。她和Alfonso VI de Galicia Rey de Castilla y Leon至少有2個女兒。她去世於1128年5月25日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯卡斯特洛日斯卡斯特洛格日斯享年68歲，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安利安薇佳 德 艾斯皮納爾達。

nameMeanings.name: Muñoz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Miguel, Francisco, Mario, Ruben, Pedro, Jorge.  Portuguese Wenceslao, Catarina, Paulo, Anatolio.
Spanish (Muñoz): patronymic from the old personal name Muño. Compare Nunoz .

variants.name: Nunoz
meanings: Hispanic (Nuñoz): altered form of Spanish Muñoz (see Munoz ).

variants.name: Munos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Jaime, Pablo, Rafael, Raul, Adolfo, Alfonso, Balentin, Beatriz, Carlos.
Spanish (Muños): variant of Muñoz (see Munoz ). This surname is most common in Colombia.

nameMeanings.name: Jimena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Jiménez (see Jimenez ).

variants.name: Jimenez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Francisco, Miguel, Pedro, Mario, Rafael, Raul.
Spanish (Jiménez): patronymic from the medieval personal name Jimeno . Compare Gimenez , Himenez , Jimenes , Jiminez , and Ximenez .

en.lifeSummary: When Jimena Muñoz was born in 1060, in Castilla y León, Spain, her father, Munio Muñoz de Bierzo Conde de Bierzo, was 40 and her mother, Velazquita Muñoz, was 31. She had at least 2 daughters with Alfonso VI de Galicia Rey de Castilla y Leon. She died on 25 May 1128, in Castrogeriz, Castrojeriz, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain, at the age of 68, and was buried in Vega de Espinareda, León, Castilla y León, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jimena Muñoz est née en 1060, à Castilla y León, Espagne, son père, Munio Muñoz de Bierzo Conde de Bierzo, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Velazquita Muñoz, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Alfonso VI de Galicia Rey de Castilla y Leon. Elle est décédée le 25 mai 1128, à Castrogeriz, Castrojeriz, Burgos, Castilla y León, Espagne, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Vega d’Espinareda, León, Castilla y León, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jimena Muñoz 1060 in Castilla y León, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Munio Muñoz de Bierzo Conde de Bierzo 40 und ihre Mutter Velazquita Muñoz 31. Sie hatte mit Alfonso VI de Galicia Rey de Castilla y Leon mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Mai 1128 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Castrogeriz, Castrojeriz, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spanien und wurde in Vega de Espinareda, León, Castilla y León, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jimena Muñoz è nata il nel 1060 nel Castilla y León, Spagna, sua padre, Munio Muñoz de Bierzo Conde de Bierzo, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Velazquita Muñoz, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con Alfonso VI de Galicia Rey de Castilla y Leon. Morì il 25 maggio 1128, nel Castrogeriz, Castrojeriz, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spagna, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Vega de Espinareda, León, Castilla y León, Spagna.

ko.Castrogeriz, Burgos, Castilla-Leon, Spai: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 버고스 카스트로제이리즈 카스트로저이즈
ko.Vega de Espinareda, León, Castilla y Leó: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 레o 베가 데 에스핀아레다
ko.lifeSummary: Jimena Muñoz(이)가 1060년 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Munio Muñoz de Bierzo Conde de Bierzo(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Velazquita Muñoz(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Alfonso VI de Galicia Rey de Castilla y Leon(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1128년 5월 25일 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 버고스 카스트로제이리즈 카스트로저이즈에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 레o 베가 데 에스핀아레다에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jimena Muñoz nasceu em 1060, em Castilla y León, Espanha, seu pai, Munio Muñoz de Bierzo Conde de Bierzo, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Velazquita Muñoz, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Alfonso VI de Galicia Rey de Castilla y Leon. Ela faleceu em 25 de maio de 1128, em Castrogeriz, Castrojeriz, Burgos, Castilla y León, Espanha, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Vega de Espinareda, León, Castilla y León, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jimena Muñoz родилась в 1060 г. в местности кастилла и леoн, Испания, её отцу по имени Munio Muñoz de Bierzo Conde de Bierzo было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Velazquita Muñoz, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Alfonso VI de Galicia Rey de Castilla y Leon. Она умерла 25 мая 1128 г. в местности кастрогириз, кастроджириз, бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности вега де эспинареда, леoн, кастилла и леoн, Испания.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Alfonso VI de Galicia Rey de Castilla y Leon.
